name: Sand Tarts (Real Old German Style)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually add the flour to the butter mixture, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
3. Add the well-beaten eggs and mix until combined.
4. Refrigerate the dough for at least 24 hours.
5. Roll out the chilled dough on a lightly floured surface to about 1/8 inch thickness.
6. Cut into desired shapes using cookie cutters.
7. Brush the cookies with the slightly beaten egg white.
8. Sprinkle each cookie with sugar and cinnamon.
9. Place half of a pecan in the center of each cookie.
10. Bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
Source: Pennsylvania Dutch Cook Book - Fine Old Recipes, Culinary Arts Press, 1936.
